golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on general credit card validation without specifying a provider, and their descriptions and test cases align closely.

GENC-2 addresses provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Visa validation, but does not exclusively focus on Visa credit cards.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 aligns closely with GC-1 in scope and description, focusing on general credit card validation without specifying a provider.
GENC-2 addresses provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with GC-9 (Visa validation), but does not exclusively focus on Visa credit cards.
GENC-3 aligns closely with GC-2 in scope and description, focusing on handling invalid or unsupported credit card providers.
